project_tagline: A single-user job-aggregation web app that runs pre-defined filters across the major job boards, LLM-scores newly-listed jobs for fitness, and ranks them for quick reference and applying.
architecture_sketch: homejobboard is a personal job-aggregation web app (single-user). A Hono + Zod API (apps/api, port 3001) runs scheduled scrapers/fetchers against the major job boards using a set of pre-defined filters, normalizes the listings, and stores them in PostgreSQL via Drizzle. New listings are scored for fitness by an LLM (via the home cluster's llmgw gateway) and ranked. A Next.js App Router frontend (apps/web, port 3000) shows the freshly-listed, ranked jobs for reference and offers a quick way to send out applications. packages/shared holds shared Zod schemas/types. Deployed to the home k3s cluster via a Helm chart (deploy/chart) under Argo CD GitOps, mirroring the sibling homenews/homework/homecal repos. Concrete job-board targets and the application 'send out' mechanism are deferred to a POC.
constraints: Single-user, self-hosted only. No multi-tenancy and no auth. Specific job-board integrations and the application 'send out' mechanism are intentionally deferred to a later POC and not yet decided.
